title: WAIC 2026 开幕深度报道——习近平主席宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO），中国AI从「技术追赶」到「规则制定」的转折点
title_en: WAIC 2026 Deep Dive—President Xi Announces WAICO, China's AI Crosses from 'Tech Catching Up' to 'Rule Setting'
subtitle: 29个创始成员国签署《上海协定》，全球首个AI政府间国际组织诞生。从习近平开幕式讲话要点到国家发改委8大行动计划，全面解读WAIC 2026如何重塑全球AI治理格局。
subtitle_en: 29 founding members sign the Shanghai Agreement, the world's first intergovernmental AI organization is born. From Xi's keynote highlights to the NDRC's 8 action plans, a comprehensive look at how WAIC 2026 is reshaping global AI governance.
summary: WAIC 2026 深度报道——习近平主席出席开幕式并宣布成立世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO），29个创始成员国签署协定。中国AI从「技术追赶」到「规则制定」的转折点，全球AI治理格局的里程碑事件。
summary_en: WAIC 2026 deep dive—President Xi announces WAICO with 29 founding members. The inflection point where China's AI shifts from 'tech catching up' to 'rule setting,' a milestone in global AI governance.
author: AI News Daily
source: AI News Daily 综合报道
